{% macro docs_toc(page) %} {% if page.toc %} {% set first_entry = page.toc | first %} {# If TOC has a single h1 entry with children, use those children as top-level #} {% if page.toc | length == 1 and first_entry.children %} {% set toc_entries = first_entry.children %} {% else %} {% set toc_entries = page.toc %} {% endif %}

On this page

    {% for h2 in toc_entries %}
  • {{ h2.title }} {% if h2.children %}
      {% for h3 in h2.children %}
    • {{ h3.title }} {% if h3.children %}
        {% for h4 in h3.children %}
      • {{ h4.title }}
        • {% endfor %}
      {% endif %}
      • {% endfor %}
    {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endmacro %}
